arts.ttl: The Ballon d'Or winners who have played at Old Trafford in Europe
arts.sum: When United’s reign as European Cup holders was ended in 1969, AC Milan great Gianni Rivera – who won the award later that year – was part of the Rossoneri’s 2-1 aggregate triumph, despite carrying an injury into the second leg in M16. Ferencvaros talisman Florian Albert (1967) would reign supreme two years after his 1965 Fairs Cup visit, while Eusebio ’s arrival with Benfica in 1966 represented the first time a reigning Ballon d’Or holder would perform as an Old Trafford visitor.
